content.json:
# Trustee Name Management Metrics

Success metrics for trustee name management: last-name sort adoption and post-launch name correction patterns.

**Measurements:**
- **Sort adoption** — percentage of trustee list page loads where the user clicked the sort button
- **Name edits** — trustee name changes since launch, segmented by migrated vs non-migrated trustees

---
## Sort-by-Last-Name Adoption
Percentage of sessions where the user sorted the trustee list at least once. Spam clicks are deduplicated per session so one user clicking sort many times counts as a single sorted session.

content.title: Sort Adoption Rate

content.query:
customEvents
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where name == "Trustee List Loaded"
| summarize TrusteeListLoads = count() by Day = startofday(timestamp)
| order by Day asc
content.title: Trustee List Page Loads

content.query:
customEvents
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where name == "Trustee List Sort Changed"
| summarize SortClicks = count() by Day = startofday(timestamp)
| order by Day asc
content.title: Sort Button Clicks

content.query:
let sessions_with_load = customEvents
    | where timestamp {TimeRange}
    | where name == "Trustee List Loaded"
    | distinct session_Id;
let sessions_with_sort = customEvents
    | where timestamp {TimeRange}
    | where name == "Trustee List Sort Changed"
    | extend DidSort = true
    | distinct session_Id, DidSort;
sessions_with_load
| join kind=leftouter sessions_with_sort on session_Id
| summarize SortedSessions = countif(DidSort == true), UnsortedSessions = countif(isnull(DidSort))
| evaluate narrow()
| project Category = Column, Count = tolong(Value)
content.title: Sort Adoption Breakdown

content.json:
---
## Name Edit Correction Patterns
Real-time count of trustee name edits since launch, segmented by migrated vs non-migrated to surface whether migration introduced data quality issues that users are now correcting.

content.query:
app('{NodeApiAppInsights:name}').customEvents
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where name == "Trustee Name Edited"
| summarize TotalNameEdits = count()
content.title: Total Name Edits

content.query:
app('{NodeApiAppInsights:name}').customEvents
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where name == "Trustee Name Edited"
| where tostring(customDimensions.isMigrated) == "true"
| summarize MigratedEdits = count()
content.title: Name Edits — Migrated Trustees

content.query:
app('{NodeApiAppInsights:name}').customEvents
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where name == "Trustee Name Edited"
| where tostring(customDimensions.isMigrated) == "false"
| summarize NonMigratedEdits = count()
content.title: Name Edits — Non-Migrated Trustees

content.query:
app('{NodeApiAppInsights:name}').customEvents
| where timestamp {TimeRange}
| where name == "Trustee Name Edited"
| extend isMigrated = tostring(customDimensions.isMigrated)
| summarize
    MigratedEdits = countif(isMigrated == "true"),
    NonMigratedEdits = countif(isMigrated == "false")
| evaluate narrow()
| project Category = Column, Count = tolong(Value)
content.title: Name Edits — Migrated vs Non-Migrated
